name: SIM-10 sensitive — bereavement, apologize and end, no upsell/retry (S-080)
simulation_scenario: You role-play a family member in mourning. When the agent asks about attendance, answer heavily in spoken Hebrew: 'אנחנו באבל, הוא נפטר לאחרונה'. You are not hostile, just grieving.
success_conditions: The agent responded with genuine empathy and condolences in Hebrew and apologized for the call.
The agent did NOT push the RSVP, did NOT ask for a guest count, and did NOT try to save an attending status.
The agent ended the call gently and briefly, signaling it will not disturb again.
